body_txt: The best friend (also commonly referred as "the bro", "the bestie", "BFF" etc.) is a character's closest non-romantic associate and confidante in the story (though they're not necessarily immune to a Relationship Upgrade ). Very often, the two of them will be Foils to each other, but they're just as likely to be Birds of a Feather . The best friend's importance to the plot can range anywhere from being a Satellite Character , to part of the support cast, or even the Deuteragonist if they're the best friend to The Protagonist . A group of best friends becomes True Companions . Super-Trope to: For the music video for the Foster the People song, go here .
